full_text:
Li Zhen жқҺзҰҺ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Zhen (жқҺзҰҺ)was born in Beidi. An acquittance of Li Jue, he reassured the general about the courtiers being armed. Li Zhen was affiliated with Li Jue and the Han Dynasty.
